series_metadata.series_title: STEM (Science Technology Engineering Mathematics) school application
series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes applications for approval to become a STEM school that are required to be submitted to the Ohio Department of Education’s STEM Committee, as established by section 3326.03 and 3326.032 of the Revised Code

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain five (5) years after school closes or after the school designation has been revoked, provided the records have been audited by the Auditor of State and the audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved.Duplicates: Retain until obsolete, superseded or administrative value is lost., Electronic: Delete
